name: Coit Tower
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Historic structure report : Coit Tower, San Francisco, California
documents.creator: Arts Commission of San Francisco
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1989 preservation assessment of the tower's fabric — exterior walls, tower shaft, belvedere — prepared for the Arts Commission.

documents.title: San Francisco civic art collection : a guided tour to publicly owned art of the City and County of San Francisco
documents.creator: Arts Commission of San Francisco
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: Places the tower's murals under the Arts Commission's civic-design and aesthetic-review authority.

documents.title: Minutes / Recreation and Park Commission
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Recreation and Park Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
